params.name: AGENT_DIR
params.description: Control-M/Agent home directory (DO NOT CHANGE)

params.name: ATCMNDATA
params.description: Agent-to-Server Port Number. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: CTMSHOST
params.description: Primary Control-M/Server Host. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: CTMPERMHOSTS
params.description: Authorized Control-M/Server Hosts. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.
params.errMsg: You can not use blanks in the list of Authorized hosts. Use vertical bar only For example: host1|host2|host3|host4

params.name: PROTOCOL_VERSION
params.description: Protocol version. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: COMMRETCNT
params.description: Number of Communication Retries. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: COMMRETSLP
params.description: Communication Retry Connect Sleep Time (in seconds). This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: LOGICAL_AGENT_NAME
params.description: Logical Agent Name. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.
params.errMsg: Agent Logical Name cannot be blank

params.name: ALLOW_COMM_INIT
params.description: Allow Comm Init. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: LISTEN_INTERFACE
params.description: Listen to Network Interface. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.

params.name: CTMS_ADDR_MODE
params.description: CTMS Address Mode. This parameter only affects ctm-lin-srv.werkstatt.local.
params.errMsg: Valid values are: IP or blank

params.name: UTTIMEOUT
params.description: Timeout for Agent utilities

params.name: TCP_IP_TIMEOUT
params.description: TCP/IP Timeout

params.name: AUTHORIZED_CTM_IP
params.description: Authorized Control-M/Server IP addresses
params.errMsg: You can not use blanks in the list of Authorized Control-M/Server IP addresses. Use vertical bar only. For example: ip1|ip2|ip3|ip4

params.name: RU_COMM_PORT
params.description: Remote utilities Port Number

params.name: UPLOAD_REMOTE_UTILS
params.description: upload Agent utilities to Agentless host

params.name: DBGLVL
params.description: General Diagnostics Level

params.name: AGDBGLVL
params.description: AG Diagnostics Level

params.name: ASDBGLVL
params.description: AS Diagnostics Level

params.name: ATDBGLVL
params.description: AT Diagnostics Level

params.name: ARDBGLVL
params.description: AR Diagnostics Level

params.name: UTDBGLVL
params.description: Utilities Diagnostics Level

params.name: AJDBGLVL
params.description: Java Diagnostics Level

params.name: FWDBGLVL
params.description: FileWatcher service Diagnostics Level

params.name: RHDBGLVL
params.description: Agentless hosr service Diagnostics Level

params.name: BUFFERED_DBGLVL
params.description: First Failure Data Capture Diagnostic level

params.name: DBG_RESET_INTERVAL
params.description: First Failure Data Capture Reset interval (sec)

params.name: DBG_OPEN_ONCE
params.description: Open the proclog file only once. Default is N - open before every write. Change to this parameter effect new processes/threads only

params.name: ONSTMT_BUFFERED_DBGLVL
params.description: First Failure Data Capture Diagnostic level for ON statement processing

params.name: LOGKEEPDAYS
params.description: Days To Retain Log Files

params.name: MEASURE_USAGE_DAYS
params.description: Days To Retain Daily Log Files

params.name: RH_KEEPDAYS
params.description: Days To Retain Host Specification Files

params.name: GENERAL_CLEANUP_INTERVAL
params.description: General cleanup interval ( days )

params.name: AG_LOG_ON
params.description: Daily Log File Enabled

params.name: AG_LOG_APPEND_LINK
params.description: Append link to Daily Log File message (requires process recycle)

params.name: LIMIT_LOG_FILE_SIZE
params.description: Maximum size of log file (MB)

params.name: LIMIT_LOG_VERSIONS
params.description: Number of log file versions

params.name: SYSKEEPDAYS
params.description: Days To Retain OUTPUT Files

params.name: OUTPUT_LIMIT_SIZE_START
params.description: Job output limit size from the start in KB.

params.name: OUTPUT_LIMIT_SIZE_END
params.description: Job output limit size from the end in kB.

params.name: UTIL_REAL_EXIT_CODE
params.description: Return actual exit code from Agent utilities

params.name: WATCHDOG_ENABLED
params.description: Allow Failed Processes Recovery (Watchdog Enabled)

params.name: AD_RETAIN_PACKAGES
params.description: Cleanup interval for Agent AutoDeploy Packages ( days )

params.name: AD_GA_RETAIN_DAYS
params.description: Cleanup interval for Agent cleanup of backup4restore directory which created while upgrading the Agent to current GA version. After backup4restore cleanup, Agent downgrade will not be available.

params.name: AD_DECODING_BY_CHUNKS
params.description: Decode Agent package by chunks in auto deployment.

params.name: USE_JOB_VARIABLES
params.description: Convert job variables to environment variables

params.name: MIN_FREE_SPACE
params.description: Minimum free disk space in MB required for job submission

params.name: MIN_FREE_SPACE_WARN
params.description: Free disk space threshold in MB for Agent alerts

params.name: TRACKER_EVENT_PORT
params.description: Tracker Event Port

params.name: EVENT_TIMEOUT
params.description: Tracker Polling Interval

params.name: RETRY_TIMEOUT
params.description: Tracker Retry Timeout interval
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Tracker Retry Timeout interval

params.name: RECOVERY_TIMEOUT
params.description: Tracker wait for Job's Status file after Job Submission (seconds)
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Tracker wait for Job's Status file

params.name: TRACKER_STARTUP_DELAY
params.description: Tracker startup delay (seconds) needed to allow all Java tracking services to load
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Tracker startup delay

params.name: AGENT_TO_SERVER_CONNECT
params.description: Allow Agent Tracker to send updates to Control-M/Server

params.name: AT_UPDATE_PRIMARY
params.description: Whether Tracker should send job's updates to the Primary Control-M/Server. Default is N - send to DSECT host first

params.name: DELETE_BACKUP_FILES
params.description: Delete Backup file when job output file is moved or deleted

params.name: TRACK_MAX_RETRY
params.description: Maximum number of times the Tracker can receive an error code from the CM before setting the job to disappeared status
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Tracker max retries

params.name: MULTITRACK_ENABLED
params.description: Enable Multiple Parallel Trackers

params.name: MULTITRACK_MAX_PROC
params.description: Maximum number of parallel tracker processes

params.name: MULTITRACK_SKIP_INTERVAL
params.description: Minimum time between successive track operations on same job (sec)

params.name: MULTITRACK_JOBS_PER_WORKER
params.description: Number of jobs per Tracker process

params.name: MULTITRACK_LATE_PERIOD
params.description: Number of seconds after which a job's track is late

params.name: MULTITRACK_MAIN_EVENT_TIMEOUT
params.description: Polling interval for tracker load-balancing

params.name: CM_CHUNK_SIZE
params.description: Default Chunk size (KB) to read text information from CM. Used for requests: View Output, General request. Default is set by the request

params.name: CM_OUTPUT_CHUNK_SIZE
params.description: Default Chunk size (KB) for View Output from CM. Default is 2KB

params.name: CM_JCLDOC_CHUNK_SIZE
params.description: Default Chunk size (KB) for View/Edit JCL and documentation from CM. Default is 2KB

params.name: CM_GENERAL_CHUNK_SIZE
params.description: Default Chunk size (KB) for General request from CM. Default is 30KB

params.name: ACCUMULATED_BUFF_SIZE
params.description: Buffer size (KB) to accumulate text information from CM when sending to CTMS. Used for requests: View Output. Default is 250KB. When set to 0, no accumulation is done

params.name: SUPPRESS_CM_UPDATES
params.description: Toggle whether execution time updates for plug-in jobs are sent from Control-M/Agent to Control-M/Server. When toggled on, updates will not be sent.

params.name: WKL_SLEEP_INTERVAL
params.description: Interval between CPU monitor operations (sec)

params.name: WKL_HB_INTERVAL
params.description: Interval between CPU usage synch updates (min)

params.name: WKL_CPU_SAMPLE_NUM
params.description: Number of CPU samples for average CPU usage

params.name: WKL_CPU_SAMPLE_INTERVAL
params.description: Interval between CPU samples (sec)

params.name: CMACC_AV_INTERVAL
params.description: Interval between Account Availability monitor operations (sec)

params.name: CMACC_UNAV_INTERVAL
params.description: Interval between Account Unavailability monitor operations (sec)

params.name: MEASURE_FUNCTION_CALLS
params.description: Measure function calls

params.name: WRITE_MEASURES_INTERVAL
params.description: Write measures interval (in minutes). The interval between writing all cached measurements to file

params.name: AG_NOT_RESPONDING_TIME
params.description: Time in minutes to determine that main Agent process is not responding

params.name: AT_NOT_RESPONDING_TIME
params.description: Time in minutes to determine that Agent tracker process is not responding

params.name: AR_NOT_RESPONDING_TIME
params.description: Time in minutes to determine that Agent router process is not responding

params.name: PROCESS_NOT_RESPONDING_ALERT_INTERVAL
params.description: Determine the interval for the Agent to send alert when process is not responding (min)

params.name: CHECK_DISKSPACE_INTERVAL
params.description: Determine the interval to check if there is enough free disk space (min)

params.name: SSL_CONTEXT_VALIDATION_INTERVAL
params.description: Determines the number of hours to wait before the Agent validates SSL keystore and certificates when using SSL mode

params.name: SSL_CONTEXT_VALIDATION_DAYS
params.description: Determines the number of days in advance that the Agent checks if the SSL keystore and certificates will expire when using SSL mode

params.name: JAVA_AR
params.description: Set Java service as router for all Server<->Agent communications. Agent restart is required for change to take effect

params.name: AG_JAVA_HOME
params.description: Path to external java directory

params.name: MAX_AG_JAVA_MEMORY
params.description: Maximum java memory for agent start up

params.name: DISABLE_CM_ONSTMT
params.description: Disable Parallel Post Processing for all CM's

params.name: ONSTMT_CASE_SENSITIVE
params.description: Case sensitive ON statement processing

params.name: ONSTMT_ADD_WILD
params.description: Whether On Statement and On Code should be enclosed with wildcard (*) character during OnStatement processing. Default is N - On Statement and On Code remains as defined by the user

params.name: I18N
params.description: Foreign Language Support

params.name: APPLICATION_LOCALE
params.description: CJK Encoding
params.errMsg: This parameter is valid only if Foreign Language Support is set to CJK.

params.name: WRAP_PARAM_QUOTES
params.description: Wrap parameters with double quotes. 1 - Wrap parameters with blanks, 2 - never wrap and existing quotes are removed, 3 - always wrap, 4 - never wrap (compatibility mode)

params.name: JOB_WAIT
params.description: Job children inside job object

params.name: RUN_USER_LOGON_SCRIPT
params.description: Run user 'Logon Script'

params.name: ECHO_OUTPUT
params.description: Echo Job Commands into Job output

params.name: ENABLE_RECOVERY
params.description: Enable jobs recovery when Agent monitoring process terminates unexpectedly

params.name: CODE_PAGE
params.description: Code Page for job processing in Latin-1 mode
params.errMsg: Use a valid code page or 0 to use the Agent computer default code page

params.name: LOGON_AS_USER
params.description: Logon As User

params.name: DOMAIN
params.description: Logon Domain

params.name: OUTPUT_NAME
params.description: Job output file name

params.name: DFTPRT
params.description: Default Printer

params.name: JOB_STATISTIC
params.description: Add Job Object statistics to Job output

params.name: SMTP_SERVER_NAME
params.description: SMTP Server (Relay) Name

params.name: SMTP_PORT_NUMBER
params.description: Port Number

params.name: SMTP_SENDER_EMAIL
params.description: Sender Email

params.name: SMTP_SENDER_FRIENDLY_NAME
params.description: Sender Friendly Name

params.name: SMTP_REPLY_TO_EMAIL
params.description: Reply-To Email

params.name: RJX_LIMIT_NUMBER_OF_JOBS
params.description: Limit number of Agentless host jobs per Agent

params.name: RJX_CONN_TRY
params.description: Agentless Connection Retries
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Agentless Connection retries

params.name: RJX_CONN_TOUT
params.description: Time Interval between Restore Connections
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Time Interval between Restore Connections

params.name: RJX_OUTPUT_DIR
params.description: Agentless Temporary Directory

params.name: RJX_DETAILS_TO_OUTPUT
params.description: Print Details to job output file

params.name: SSH_VER_CMD
params.description: Command to determine remote platform type (SSH)

params.name: RJX_CLEAN_ENV
params.description: Delete temporary files on Agentless host after job execution

params.name: RJX_KEEP_OUTPUT
params.description: Leave the job output file on the Agentless host when the job ends

params.name: RJX_COPY_OUTPUT_REMOTE
params.description: Perform job output file copy/move actions on the Agentless host

params.name: RJX_MULTIPLE_HOST
params.description: Allow multiple Agentless host keys (for clusters)

params.name: RJX_SSH_CLOSE_TOUT
params.description: SSH connection timeout for job monitoring (Mode 2) (sec)

params.name: RJX_LIFE_CHK_INTERVAL
params.description: Job completion monitoring interval (SSH) (sec)

params.name: RJX_MISSING_CMDLINE_PARAMS_POLICY
params.description: Missing command line parameters policy (SSH). T(runcate) from the missing parameter (Default), I(gnore) the missing parameter, P(ad) the missing parameter

params.name: WMI_WAIT_TIME_OUT
params.description: Interval for WMI job completion polling (msec)

params.name: WMI_TCP_ONLY_PING
params.description: Disable WMI connection when pinging Agentless host

params.name: WMI_REMOTE_SHARED_NAME
params.description: Set the shared directory name used by Agent for WMI jobs

params.name: RJX_DOWNLOAD_OUTPUT
params.description: Download job output file from Agentless host when job ends

params.name: RJX_FORCE_OS_CHECKING
params.description: Discover Agentless host platform for every job

params.name: RJX_POOL_CONNECTION_LIMIT
params.description: Maximum number of jobs that can use a single connection
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Connection Limit

params.name: RJX_POOL_SLEEP_TIME
params.description: The time interval that is used to monitor the connections and release unused connections
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Sleeping Time

params.name: RJX_POOL_KEEP_UNUSED
params.description: The maximum time a connection is kept unused
params.errMsg: Only positive numbers permitted for Keep Unused

params.name: RJX_SSH_RETRIES
params.description: Number of retries when communicating via SSH-courier

params.name: RJX_COURIER_DELAYED_SSH_CLOSE
params.description: keep SSH channel open during remote job execution

params.name: KILL_EXIT_CODE
params.description: Exit code for killed jobs
